title: cuphea spermacoce var. erectifolia
intro: Cuphea spermacoce var. erectifolia, also known as Firecracker Plant, is a flowering plant species within the Lythraceae family. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Cuphea spermacoce var. erectifolia include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and topical creams, although its availability and use may vary due to limited research and regional regulations.
